content.text:
Based on the zoomed-in view of atom C:1, I can clearly identify its neighbour atoms:

**Atom C:1 is covalently connected to:**

1. **Atom 0** - O (Oxygen) - shown in red, appears to be double bonded (carbonyl oxygen)
2. **Atom 2** - N (Nitrogen) - shown in blue
3. **Atom 23** - C (Carbon) - shown in yellow/gold, part of the benzene ring

**Summary of neighbour atoms of C:1:**
| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 0 | O |
| 2 | N |
| 23 | C |

**geomconf_index:** 848

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 1, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
